content.json:
# SOC Threat Hunting Workbook
## Microsoft Sentinel — MITRE ATT&CK Kill Chain Detection
**Author:** Mamoon Ahmad | **Target:** victim-win10 | **SIEM:** Microsoft Sentinel

---

| Field | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Environment** | Azure VM (Windows 10) → Log Analytics Workspace → Microsoft Sentinel |
| **Attack Source** | Kali Linux (Evil-WinRM, Metasploit winrm_login) |
| **MITRE Coverage** | TA0001, TA0002, TA0003, TA0004, TA0005 |
| **Detection Method** | KQL Analytics — SecurityEvent + WindowsEvent tables |

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID == 4625
| summarize FailedLogons = count()
content.title: Failed Logon Attempts

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID == 4720
| summarize NewAccounts = count()
content.title: New Accounts Created

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID == 4698
| summarize Tasks = count()
content.title: Scheduled Tasks Created

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID == 1102
| summarize LogClears = count()
content.title: Security Log Cleared

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID in (4625, 4624, 4698, 4720, 4732, 1102)
| extend AttackStage = case(
    EventID == 4625, "Brute Force",
    EventID == 4624, "Initial Access",
    EventID == 4698, "Scheduled Task",
    EventID == 4720, "Account Created",
    EventID == 4732, "Added to Admins",
    EventID == 1102, "Log Cleared",
    "Other"
)
| summarize count() by AttackStage, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Attack Activity Timeline — All Stages

content.json:
## Campaign 1 — Brute Force & Credential Access
**MITRE:** TA0001 Initial Access | T1110.001 Password Guessing  
**Table:** SecurityEvent | **Key Event IDs:** 4625 (fail), 4624 (success)

**Hypothesis:** Adversary performing credential brute force via WinRM.
High volume of 4625 events from single source IP followed by
successful 4624 — confirms credential compromise.

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID == 4625
| where IpAddress != "-" and IpAddress != "127.0.0.1"
| summarize
    FailedAttempts = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    TargetAccounts = makeset(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress
| where FailedAttempts > 3
| extend RiskLevel = case(
    FailedAttempts > 100, "🔴 CRITICAL",
    FailedAttempts > 50,  "🟠 HIGH",
    FailedAttempts > 10,  "🟡 MEDIUM",
                          "🟢 LOW"
)
| project
    FirstSeen, SourceIP = IpAddress,
    FailedAttempts, RiskLevel,
    TargetAccounts
| order by FailedAttempts desc
content.title: Brute Force Sources

content.query:
let BruteForce =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where Computer == "victim-win10"
    | where EventID == 4625
    | summarize FailCount = count() by IpAddress, TargetUserName
    | where FailCount > 3;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType in (3, 10)
| where IpAddress != "-"
| join kind=inner BruteForce
    on $left.IpAddress == $right.IpAddress,
       $left.TargetUserName == $right.TargetUserName
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Account = TargetUserName,
    SourceIP = IpAddress,
    Computer,
    LogonType,
    FailCountBeforeSuccess = FailCount
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Brute Force → Successful Logon (Confirmed Compromise)

content.json:
## Campaign 2 — Initial Access & Execution
**MITRE:** TA0002 Execution | T1078 Valid Accounts | T1550.002 Pass-the-Hash  
**Table:** SecurityEvent | **Key Event IDs:** 4624 (LogonType 3), 4672

**Hypothesis:** Adversary established remote WinRM session using
stolen credentials. NTLM authentication with SeDebugPrivilege
and SeImpersonatePrivilege assigned confirms attacker-level access.

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID in (4624, 4634, 4672)
| where LogonType in (3, 10)
| where IpAddress != "-" and IpAddress != "127.0.0.1"
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    EventID,
    Activity,
    Account = TargetUserName,
    SourceIP = IpAddress,
    LogonType,
    AuthPackage = AuthenticationPackageName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Remote Session Activity — NTLM Logons

content.json:
## Campaign 3 — Persistence
**MITRE:** TA0003 Persistence | T1547.001 Registry Run Keys | T1053.005 Scheduled Tasks | T1136.001 Create Account  
**Table:** SecurityEvent | **Key Event IDs:** 4698, 4720, 4732

**Hypothesis:** Adversary establishing multiple persistence mechanisms
to survive reboots. New local admin account creation immediately
followed by Administrators group membership confirms backdoor access.

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID == 4698
| parse EventData with * '<Data Name="TaskName">' TaskName '</Data>' *
| parse EventData with * '<Data Name="SubjectUserName">' CreatedBy '</Data>' *
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, CreatedBy, TaskName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Scheduled Tasks Created

content.query:
let NewAccounts =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where Computer == "victim-win10"
    | where EventID == 4720
    | project
        AccountCreatedTime = TimeGenerated,
        NewAccount = TargetUserName,
        NewAccountSid = TargetSid,
        CreatedBy = SubjectUserName,
        Computer;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID == 4732
| where TargetUserName == "Administrators"
| project
    AddedToAdminTime = TimeGenerated,
    MemberSid = MemberSid,
    AddedBy = SubjectUserName,
    Computer
| join kind=inner NewAccounts
    on $left.MemberSid == $right.NewAccountSid,
       $left.Computer == $right.Computer
| extend MinutesBetween = datetime_diff('minute', AddedToAdminTime, AccountCreatedTime)
| project
    AccountCreatedTime,
    AddedToAdminTime,
    MinutesBetween,
    NewAccount,
    CreatedBy,
    Computer
| order by AccountCreatedTime desc
content.title: New Account → Added to Administrators (Backdoor Chain)

content.json:
## Campaign 4 — Defense Evasion
**MITRE:** TA0005 Defense Evasion | T1070.001 Clear Windows Event Logs  
**Table:** SecurityEvent | **Key Event ID:** 1102

**Hypothesis:** Adversary clearing Windows Security event log
to destroy forensic evidence post-compromise. Sentinel detects
this because AMA forwards logs in real-time before local deletion.
Log clearing itself becomes the evidence.

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID == 1102
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Computer,
    ClearedBy = SubjectUserName,
    Severity = "⚫ CRITICAL — Log Cleared"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Security Log Cleared Events

content.query:
let LogClearEvents =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where Computer == "victim-win10"
    | where EventID == 1102
    | project ClearTime = TimeGenerated,
        Computer, ClearedBy = SubjectUserName;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID in (4625, 4624, 4720, 4732, 4698)
| join kind=inner LogClearEvents on Computer
| where TimeGenerated between ((ClearTime - 1h) .. ClearTime)
| summarize
    EventsBeforeClear = count(),
    EventTypes = makeset(EventID),
    AccountsInvolved = makeset(TargetUserName)
    by Computer, ClearedBy, ClearTime
| project
    ClearTime, Computer, ClearedBy,
    EventsBeforeClear, EventTypes, AccountsInvolved
content.title: Pre-Clear Attack Context — What Happened Before Log Wipe

content.json:
## Full Kill Chain — Complete Attack Timeline
**All MITRE Tactics in Chronological Order**

This query shows the complete attack from first brute force attempt
through to log clearing — the entire kill chain in a single view.

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer == "victim-win10"
| where EventID in (4625, 4624, 4672, 4698, 4720, 4732, 1102)
| extend AttackStage = case(
    EventID == 4625, "🔴 1 — Brute Force Failed Logon",
    EventID == 4624, "🟠 2 — Initial Access Successful Logon",
    EventID == 4672, "🟠 3 — Execution Special Privileges",
    EventID == 4698, "🟡 4 — Persistence Scheduled Task",
    EventID == 4720, "🟡 5 — Persistence New Account",
    EventID == 4732, "🟡 6 — Persistence Added to Admins",
    EventID == 1102, "⚫ 7 — Defense Evasion Log Cleared",
    "Unknown"
)
| extend Actor = case(
    EventID == 1102, SubjectUserName,
    EventID == 4625, TargetUserName,
    EventID == 4624, TargetUserName,
    EventID == 4672, SubjectUserName,
    EventID == 4698, SubjectUserName,
    EventID == 4720, TargetUserName,
    EventID == 4732, SubjectUserName,
    "-"
)
| extend SourceIP = case(
    EventID in (4624, 4625), IpAddress,
    "-"
)
| where Actor != "-" and Actor != ""
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    AttackStage,
    Actor,
    SourceIP,
    Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Complete MITRE ATT&CK Kill Chain — victim-win10
